name: Jiaoqiu
description:
(Pre 2.5)

While enjoying dinner together, your lips turn red from all the spice he’s added.

Do I have Acheron? No. Do I play DOT? No. Did I still get him to E2S1? Yes he’s a little cutie he deserves it. He ended up being my second most used character after Aventurine and my most used support character this year according to the anniversary recap.

I’m sorry to all the Acheron mains that used my Jiaoqiu as support because I had him with a superbreak build. I have no regrets, he was doing like 200k per skill and unironically carried me any time there was fire weakness. I have enough dpses and supports now to bench him, but like he’s too cute for me to bench. I don’t care if he actively a liability to my team, I will play him.

I really had to tap into that nostalgic dinner feeling for this one, I finally learned the English names for a ton of stuff I used to eat as a kid. Unfortunately, I am now craving a lot of the food.

Repost because my unlucky ass posted the original right as the sight went down and it fucked stuff up (yes, this happened again)

Art by xx0ffire
creator: Mika_Hana
